scene_descriptions.page_description: A dark screen with instructions to click a screen sharing button. A small video feed of the user is in the top right.
Dark screen with task instructions: "Imagine you need to book a return domestic flight within Australia...".
Dark screen with more task instructions visible.
Dark screen with full task instructions.
Dark screen with "Please think aloud..." instruction.
Dark screen with "I'm going to open the website..." instruction.
Dark screen with an "Open" button in the center.
Flight Centre homepage loading. Red header with logo and navigation. Large hero banner with "UK & EUROPE SALE".
Black screen, likely a transition or loading state.
Flight Centre homepage with a "QANTAS FLIGHTS SALE" banner.
A modal popup "Travel dates" is visible, but covered by a large red advertisement for "World360 Rewards".
The "Travel dates" modal is now clear. It shows a calendar for Feb 2026 and Mar 2026. Dates 13 and 15 Feb are selected.
Homepage with the search widget filled out. Sydney to "Where to?", dates Wed 18 Feb - Sat 21 Feb.
The "Where to?" dropdown is open, showing popular destinations like Sydney, Melbourne, Brisbane, Perth.
Search widget now shows Sydney to Melbourne.
Same as frame 14.
Homepage hero banner changed to "NEW ZEALAND SALE".
Homepage hero banner changed to "BONUS POINTS".
Homepage hero banner changed to "GIFT THEM THE WORLD".
White screen, loading results page.
Results page loading, showing footer.
Loading screen with text "Our overhead compartments are stuffed with deals!".
Search results page for Sydney to Melbourne. List of departing flights. Filters on the left.
Same as frame 22.
A flight has been selected, and a "Select Departing Fare Type" overlay is shown with "Red Edeal" and "Economy Flex" options.
Transition screen with "Good choice! It's time to choose your flight for your return journey...".
Search results for return flight Melbourne to Sydney.
Same as frame 26.
Same as frame 27.
Return flight selected, "Select Returning Fare Type" overlay shown with "Lite", "Choice", and "Flex" options.
Transition screen with "All Set! Now let's review your flight selections...".
"Review trip" page showing departing and returning flight details.
"Review trip" page with "Price summary" visible on the right.
Scrolled down on the "Review trip" page, showing "Add-ons" section.
Same as frame 33.
"Select Seats" modal open for Flight 1 (SYD -> MEL). Seat map shown.
visible_interactive_elements: Seat selection checkboxes (Standard, Preferred, Extra Leg Room)

scene_descriptions.page_description: Same as frame 35.
Same as frame 36.
"Select Seats" modal for Flight 2 (MEL -> SYD). Seat 5E is selected.
Back on "Review trip" page, "Seats" section shows "Preferred 5E" added for MEL-SYD.
Same as frame 39.
Transition screen "Thanks for confirming your flights. Next up, your traveller details...".
White screen, loading passenger details page.
"Travellers" page. Progress bar shows step 2. "SIGN IN" button visible.
Scrolled down on "Travellers" page, showing "CONTINUE" button.
Form for "Adult 1" details: Title, First name, Last name, Date of birth.
visible_interactive_elements: "This traveller is the booking contact" checkbox

scene_descriptions.page_description: Scrolled down to contact details: Phone number, Email.
